title: senecio klattii
intro: Senecio klattii, also known as Klatt's ragwort, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to induce vomiting and serve as a purgative, although it's crucial to note that excessive consumption can be toxic. The health benefits associated with Senecio klattii include its potential use in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as a diuretic to help with urinary disorders. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, although its use should be strictly under the guidance of a medical professional due to its toxic properties.
